_meta.name: CommunityBridge Full Workflow 5-Day Demo Seed
_meta.description: Fictional, non-PHI data designed to visually exercise every implemented screen/system for app review, screenshots, QA, and demos.
notes: Current demoModeSeed consumes therapists, parents, children, staff, messageThreads, urgentMemos, progressReports, nextSessions, and moodScores directly.
Additional top-level collections are included for backend/mock/API seed expansion so every system can show populated states.

messages.text: How did Zahari do with transitions today?
He used his communication card and made moderate progress.
Can you confirm our authorization status?
Yes, there are 48 hours remaining for Zahari.
Will Noah need extra supplies this week?
Please send an extra shirt and preferred snack.
Can you review Zahari's transition goal data?
Yes, send the summary after your PM session.
Can you cover Green-1 during lunch?
Enrollment forms are ready for review.
Great, send them to parents after QA.
Pickup line is backed up today.
